backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Place type with geolocation, a Map to store places, and functions to initialize a sample "Karate Club" place and query all places sorted by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to update the website header name from 'Sports Academy Finder' to 'SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB' in Header.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, and configuration for a sports academy finder application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with comprehensive design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, title "Sports Academy Finder", and script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering Header, two sections (SportsGrid and AcademiesList) with hero content, and Footer in a flex layout.
frontend/src/components/AcademiesList.ts: Component fetching places from backend using useGetAllPlaces hook and rendering AcademyCard components in a responsive grid with loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/AcademyCard.tsx: Card component displaying academy place data with lazy-loaded image, name, description, and formatted latitude/longitude coordinates.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright for "Sports Academy Finder", current year, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, "SPORTS MANAGEMENT HUB" title, desktop navigation menu, and mobile Sheet menu with hamburger icon.
frontend/src/components/SportCard.tsx: Card component displaying sport name, description, and lazy-loaded image with hover effects and loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/SportsGrid.tsx: Grid component rendering five hardcoded sports (Basketball, Soccer, Tennis, Swimming, Volleyball) using SportCard components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all places and initializing places data using the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, including sidebar, chart, and UI component styling using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (sport photos, academy locations, static assets, header name change) and pending feature requests for a sports management website.
